To Strike Plaintiffs Request For Exemplary Damages
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
* No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant RAZOR USA LLC's motion to strike Plaintiffs' request for exemplary damages is granted -- no opposition filed. This is with leave to allege facts supporting damages if such can be done in good faith. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
